amendment.description: To provide a clarification relating to, and to prohibit the use of funds for, the White House Ballroom.

action.text: Amendment SA 5512 ruled out of order by the chair.
Motion to waive all budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 5512, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 53 - 46. Record Vote Number: 139.
Point of order that the amendment violates section 305(b)(1)(c) of the CBA raised in Senate with respect to amendment SA 5512.
Amendment SA 5512 proposed by Senator Merkley. To provide a clarification relating to, and to prohibit the use of funds for, the White House Ballroom.
